# RouteAce

> RouteAce is a Distribution Intelligence Platform for African logistics — real-time fleet tracking, intelligent dispatch, SLA enforcement, and revenue-loss prevention for operators in Nigeria and across the continent.

RouteAce, operated by Glyde Systems, helps logistics companies and enterprise distribution teams cut revenue leakage from fraud, route inefficiency, and missed SLAs. The platform spans dispatch, fleet, finance (AR/AP, payroll, tax), driver operations, and AI-powered decision intelligence.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and value proposition.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Authentication for operators, drivers, and admins.
- [Company signup](/signup/company): Onboard a logistics company or enterprise team.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How RouteAce collects, uses, and protects data (NDPA 2023).

## Optional

- [Customer portal](/customer-portal): Authenticated portal for customers of RouteAce tenants.
- [Driver app](/driver-dashboard): Authenticated mobile experience for drivers.
